title: Agonizer-6 nerve disruptor
content:
{{Top|canon=Nerve disruptor}} {{DroidSeries |image=[[File:Nerve-disruptor_negwt.jpg]] |name=Agonizer-6 nerve disruptor |creator= |manufacturer=[[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]]''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' |designer= |homeworld= |line= |model= |class=[[Interrogation droid/Legends|Interrogation droid]] |degree= |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment=*[[AI-4 droid brain]] *[[Microfilament injector]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |firstmade= |retired= }} {{Quote|We'll give him an hour with the nerve disruptor in the basement. Sir, what shape is your heart in?"
"I−I−"
"I suppose we'll find out.|[[Mosep Binneed/Legends|Mosep Binneed]], threatening [[Orrin Gault]]|[[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']]}} The '''Agonizer-6 nerve disruptor''', known simply as a '''nerve disruptor''', was a small [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droid]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ==Description== The Agonizer-6 nerve disruptor was a small device manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] in answer to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] demand for [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droids]] and [[Torture/Legends|torture]] units. The Agonizer-6 was around the size of a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]], standing on three adjustable legs, and was controlled by a fully functional [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] [[AI-4 droid brain]] with a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]], [[Audio sensor/Legends|audio sensors]], and a [[Dataport/Legends|dataport]] for connecting to other [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and [[Computer/Legends|computers]]. The AI-4 [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] was impersonal and focused on completing its assigned duties. Designed to take a victim to the very brink of their mental and physical limits, the Agonizer-6 began by assessing their current condition including any injuries sustained from previous interrogations. As the victim was questions, the Agonizer-6's droid brain constantly monitored life functions using a [[life-form analyzer]], including heartbeat, respiration, and nerve functions. As the interrogation session progressed, the Agonizer-6 would deploy [[microfilament injector]]s to dispense pain and [[Truth serum/Legends|truth drugs]] in the victim's system. At the same time, stimulators were used to trigger reactions in nerve clusters, causing symptoms ranging from tingling, pain, aches, and spasms, all the way up to inducing altered states of consciousness such as euphoria, fear, bliss, panic, relaxation, and terror. The constant barrage of torture eventually broke down the victim's mental defenses, breaking their will and forcing them to reveal their secrets. Left susceptible to suggestion, the Agonizer-6 could then use [[Hypno-imprinting|hypno-indoctrination]] and [[Hypno-imprinting|imprinting]] to [[Brainwashing|brainwash]] the victim with subconscious and posthypnotic commands. In the event that the brainwashing was discovered, one of the implanted orders was a [[Death/Legends|suicide]] command. ==History== The Agonizer-6 was a result of the Empire's increased need for interrogation and torture units. It was deployed to Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prisons]] and labor camps throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[X-7]] was tortured for his failures using various instruments, including a nerve disruptor.''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] used a nerve disruptor on [[Barid Mesoriaam]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]. Mesoriaam refused to break under the torture, and managed to pass on a [[datadot]] with vital information to the [[Thief/Legends|thieves]] [[Muftak/Legends|Muftak]] and [[Kabe/Legends|Kabe]] to transport to [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]]. The manufacture of the Agonizer-6 was stopped during the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==Appearances== *[[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] {{Ab|Kenobi (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *{{StoryCite|story=Play It Again, Figrin D'an: The Tale of Muftak and Kabe|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} *''[[Rebel Force: Renegade]]'' {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|nerve disruptor}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Arakyd Industries products]] [[Category:Droid models of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Interrogation droid models]]
